markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Kickoff meeting to align on goals, target audience, and content strategy for GC AI's engagement with GrowthX for SEO and content marketing.](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GC AI wants to own the narrative around Legal AI, positioning themselves alongside Harvey as a top player](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=7.0)
  - [Focus on in-house counsel as primary audience, with potential expansion to law firms later](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=10.0)
  - [Content should reflect GC AI's product superiority, customer obsession, and innovative approach to Legal AI](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=192.0)
  - [Aim to balance high-quality, specialized legal content with an approachable, modern voice (e.g. Morning Brew, Grammarly)](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=209.0)

## Topics

### GC AI's Current Position and Goals

  - [375 legal teams using product, including 25 unicorns](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=201.0)
  - [Beating competitors like Harvey in deals, but lacking in press/visibility](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=219.0)
  - [Aim: Be seen as one of two major players in Legal AI (with Harvey) within a year](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=247.0)
  - [Need to improve SEO presence - currently don't show up for "Legal AI" searches](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=1133.0)

### Target Audience

  - [Primary focus: In-house counsel, especially General Counsel](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=485.0)
  - [Expanding beyond tech companies into various industries (e.g. gas stations, travel centers)](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=498.0)
  - [AI adoption curve accelerating rapidly in legal sector](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=1230.0)
  - [June 2023: 56% not using AI; January 2024: down to 31% not using](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=1269.0)

### Content Strategy and Inspiration

  - [Emulate tone/approach of brands like:](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=1599.0)
      - [Morning Brew (smart content with an edge)](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=1831.0)
      - [Grammarly (achievement-focused, customer-centric)](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=1892.0)
      - [Duo Mobile (product-first, customer obsession)](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=1860.0)
  - [Avoid outdated approach of traditional legal brands (Lexis Nexis, Westlaw)](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=1904.0)
  - [Create visual breakdowns of AI concepts for legal teams](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=1994.0)
  - [Develop content around top use cases:](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3363.0)
    1.  Commercial contracts (40% of usage)
    2.  Legal research
    3.  Implementing/communicating legal advice

### Competitive Landscape

  - [Harvey: Well-funded competitor, but potentially weak on SEO](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=2552.0)
  - [Ironclad: Strong content presence (\~1100 pages)](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=2623.0)
  - [Spellbook: Word add-in for lawyers, heavy ad spend](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3460.0)

### Product Differentiators

  - [Professional-grade AI tool vs. general ChatGPT](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3436.0)
  - [Provides first citations, proper document breakdown](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3443.0)
  - [Upcoming Word add-in launch](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3456.0)

## Next Steps

  - [GC AI to share:](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3645.0)
      - [Board deck with industry/adoption data](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3595.0)
      - [Recent pitch decks](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3595.0)
      - [Access to Google Search Console, Analytics, CMS](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3645.0)
      - [Competitive research](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3697.0)
      - [Product/customer use case details](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3632.0)
  - [Schedule 45-minute follow-up meeting next week](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3749.0)
  - [GrowthX to conduct initial research and analysis](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3742.0)
  - [Begin calibration phase to align on content topics and quality](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3755.0)
  - [Develop content roadmap for coming months](https://fathom.video/share/ehwfE7b1rgz_NzdXAySY1SWyyqw9E1aD?tab=summary&timestamp=3759.0)
